perAndPolyfluoroalkylSubstance: Per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) are a class of over 12,000 synthetic chemicals used for decades to provide grease and water resistance in food packaging. However, their persistence in the environment and human body has led to a global
isABaselineRequirementForAnyBr: is a baseline requirement for any brand selling in the US (California AB 1200) or the European Union.
atAchievePackWeHaveProactively: At Achieve Pack, we have proactively eliminated all intentionally added PFAS from our flexible packaging supply chain. By utilizing

isMaintainingGreaseResistanceK: is maintaining grease resistance (Kit Level 10+) without using fluorinated compounds. We utilize several proprietary technologies to achieve this.
waterBasedDispersionsThatCreat: Water-based dispersions that create a physical barrier against oils and moisture, replacing traditional PFAS-laden paper treatments.
utilizingHighPurityPolyethylen: Utilizing high-purity Polyethylene (PE) or Polylactic Acid (PLA) layers as internal grease shields, eliminating the need for chemical additives.
ourPfasFreeStructuresMaintainT: Our PFAS-free structures maintain their barrier properties even at high temperatures (up to 100°C), making them ideal for hot-fill food.

underTheReachRegulationSeveral: Under the REACH regulation, several PFAS compounds (like PFOA and PFOS) are strictly prohibited. Achieve Pack ensures all our European-destined packaging exceeds these safety mandates.
becauseThereAreThousandsOfPfas: Because there are thousands of PFAS compounds, testing for each one is impossible. We utilize
